mapper.select: { CALL GET_PROJ_DASHBOARD( #{userId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pmpl, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endDate, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{progress, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{projectList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=projectResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{taskList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=taskResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{memoList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=memoResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{scheduleList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=scheduleResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{memberList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=memberResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler} ) }
mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('memo') FROM dual
INSERT INTO memo(id, user_id, project_id, title, content, edited_on) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{projectId}, #{title}, #{content}, SYSDATE)
